# AdvantageGuide

> A plain-language guide to Medicare Advantage supplemental benefits, covering OTC allowances, home safety modifications, DME coverage, and fall prevention for seniors aging in place.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://advantageguide.health/): Interactive tool helping Medicare Advantage members discover covered home health products
- [Blog](https://advantageguide.health/blog/): 50 guides covering OTC benefits, DME, home safety, and condition-specific Medicare Advantage coverage
- [About](https://advantageguide.health/about.html): About AdvantageGuide and author Austin Edy

## Popular Guides
- [OTC Benefit Items List](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-otc-benefit-items-list.html): Complete list of items covered by Medicare Advantage OTC benefits with categories and allowance ranges
- [Fall Prevention Benefits](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-fall-prevention-benefits.html): Guide to fall prevention benefits including Home Safety, DME, and OTC coverage
- [How to Check OTC Balance](https://advantageguide.health/blog/how-to-check-medicare-advantage-otc-balance.html): Four methods to check your OTC benefit balance
- [Benefits Most People Don't Know](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-benefits-most-people-dont-know.html): Seven underutilized Medicare Advantage supplemental benefits
- [Home Safety Benefit](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-home-safety-benefit.html): How the Home Safety benefit covers grab bars, ramps, and bathroom modifications
- [Hospital Discharge Equipment](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-hospital-discharge-equipment.html): Equipment covered after hospital discharge
- [Caregiver Guide](https://advantageguide.health/blog/medicare-advantage-caregiver-guide.html): How caregivers can help family members claim Medicare Advantage benefits

## Coverage Guides by Product

- [Stair Lift](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-stair-lift.html)
- [TENS Unit](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-tens-unit.html)

- [Pulse Oximeter](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-pulse-oximeter.html)
- [Non-Slip Bath Mat](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-non-slip-bath-mat.html)
- [Gait Belt](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-gait-belt.html)
- [Bathroom Ramp](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-bathroom-ramp.html)
- [Dental Coverage](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-dental.html)
- [Vision/Glasses](https://advantageguide.health/blog/does-medicare-advantage-cover-glasses-vision.html)

- [What Is the OTC Benefit?](https://advantageguide.health/blog/what-is-medicare-advantage-otc-benefit.html)
